title: Accadde al commissariato
writer: Felice Zappulla, Giovanni Grimaldi, Ruggero Maccari
actors: Nino Taranto, Alberto Sordi, Walter Chiari
plot: Everyday all kind of people pass through a Police Station, especially if it is downtown. Today, however, the chief of police has bought his first car and he has decided to test it with his wife going to Ostia. But first a theatric...
